query: INSERT INTO plugin_marketplace_entries (tenant_id, plugin_slug, plugin_id, version, source_url, entry_json) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, plugin_slug) DO UPDATE SET plugin_id = EXCLUDED.plugin_id, version = EXCLUDED.version, source_url = EXCLUDED.source_url, entry_json = EXCLUDED.entry_json, updated_at = now()
